title: Roses
description: A mod for Fabric that readds some of minecraft's lost treasures! Roses and Cyan Flowers, oh my!
body:
## Features:
Roses adds some of the best of the removed and forgotten parts of Minecraft. The beloved rose comes back, along with the cyan flower to bring the past to Minecraft! Other lost bits like Notch's forgotten music disc, magnetic circuit (PS, I don't condone anything Notch says, Trans Lives Matter), the sounds that would play in specific biomes, cogs, and others all in the game for you to enjoy what could've been, or what might yet come!

- Roses
- Cyan Flowers
- Cog
- Cloth in the 16 original colours
- Chairs in all wood types
- Tables in all wood types
- Rubies
- Magnetic Circuit Music Disc

## Modloader:
As of 6.0.0, the modloader now used is Fabric. This is due to the current state of chaos of Forge. 7.0.0 will likely see the return of a Forge version, but the mod will be developed primarily on Fabric from here on out.
